comment: Emissive overlay for the Placer device's main body. Inherits all geometry from `nodeworks:block/placer` and only overrides the `#0` texture binding to point at placer_emissive.png. Mirrors the user_emissive.json pattern: any face the artist paints in placer_emissive.png lights up at the network colour with the SAME per-face UV layout placer.json uses, and adding a new element / face in placer.json (Blockbench) propagates here automatically as long as it references `#0`.
